7	1

220	243	227

0	50	0	100	1	45	1	10	10000	4000000	0	0	0	0	Tv

1	50	1	200	0	40	1	15	10000	0	4000000	5	0	0	Bed

6	50	1	30	1	50	1	4	10000	4000000	4000000	4000000	0	0	Item 9
